subject: A massive demonic idol or stage structure wreathed in fire, with crowds gathered before it at night
description: An enormous demonic structure dominates the center of the image: a towering figure or idol with horns, glowing orange eyes, and a skull-like face built from interlocking dark architectural elements. Fire blazes at its base and around its midsection, bathing the entire scene in deep orange and red. Tent-like banners hang from the structure's upper reaches. At the very bottom, a crowd of tiny figures walks toward the structure across what appears to be a wide plaza or bridge, dwarfed by its scale. The sky behind is dark and obscured by smoke and the glow of flame. The image is all spectacle and domination — the Rakdos aesthetic of performer-as-deity, audience-as-congregation.
foreground: massive demonic idol structure with fire, horns, glowing eyes
background: dark smoky sky, crowd of approaching figures at base
emotion: awe, spectacle, congregation before a terrifying idol
